_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: the phospho-ErbB2 immunoreactive band overlaid with ErbB2 when blots were reprobed with a mouse monoclonal antibody detecting total ErbB2 protein
details: Successfully detected total ErbB2 protein levels and confirmed phospho-ErbB2 band identity when used to reprobe blots
